name: cursor-like-debug-mode
description: Cursor-like Debug Mode skill with local NDJSON collection and an optional Pi checkpoint chooser.

scripts.check: node --check extensions/cursor-like-debug-mode.ts && node --check extensions/cursor-like-debug-mode-choice.mjs && node --check skills/debug-mode/scripts/log-server.mjs && node --check skills/debug-mode/scripts/start-collector.mjs && node --check skills/debug-mode/scripts/summarize-log.mjs && node --check skills/debug-mode/assets/browser-log-helper.js && node --check skills/debug-mode/assets/node-log-helper.js && node --check tests/cursor-like-debug-mode-choice.test.mjs && node --check tests/distribution-compatibility.test.mjs && node --check tests/log-server.test.mjs && node --check tests/helper-assets.test.mjs && node --check tests/ste-language.test.mjs && node --check tests/summarize-log.test.mjs
scripts.test: node tests/cursor-like-debug-mode-choice.test.mjs && node tests/distribution-compatibility.test.mjs && node tests/log-server.test.mjs && node tests/helper-assets.test.mjs && node tests/ste-language.test.mjs && node tests/summarize-log.test.mjs
